add_params.name: tenantID
add_params.description: Tenant domain/ID. Formatter reads from useSettings().currentTenant and sends as 'tenantID'. PS1 reads as $TeamObj.tenantid (case-insensitive).

add_params.name: owner
add_params.description: Owner UPN extracted from user selector .value by formatter. PS1 passes as member@odata.bind with role 'owner'.

notes: customDataformatter renames the ambient currentTenant to 'tenantID', unwraps the owner user-selector object to its .value (UPN string), and passes displayName, description, visibility directly. PS1 reads $TeamObj.tenantid (lowercase 'id'), $TeamObj.owner, $TeamObj.displayName, $TeamObj.description, $TeamObj.visibility.
